compiled_state.title: Remove v2 TK/tk references from issue-quality-check, check-acceptance-criteria, issue-summary, issue-batch, release-debug-lock, qualify-ticket-refs
compiled_state.author: Joe Oakhart

comments.body:
## Description

Remove all v2 tk/TK references from 6 utility scripts missed in the original implementation plan. Replace $TK calls with ticket CLI equivalents.

## Scripts to modify
1. issue-quality-check.sh — replace $TK show with .claude/scripts/dso ticket show
2. check-acceptance-criteria.sh — replace $TK show with .claude/scripts/dso ticket show
3. issue-summary.sh — replace $TK show/list with ticket equivalents
4. issue-batch.sh — replace $TK calls with ticket equivalents
5. release-debug-lock.sh — replace $TK calls with ticket equivalents
6. qualify-ticket-refs.sh — replace tk references with ticket equivalents

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] No script contains TK= variable assignment
  Verify: { grep -l '^TK=' $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/plugins/dso/scripts/issue-quality-check.sh $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/plugins/dso/scripts/check-acceptance-criteria.sh $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/plugins/dso/scripts/issue-summary.sh $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/plugins/dso/scripts/issue-batch.sh $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/plugins/dso/scripts/release-debug-lock.sh $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/plugins/dso/scripts/qualify-ticket-refs.sh 2>/dev/null; test $? -ne 0; }
- [ ] RED tests from 8385-dd5b now pass (GREEN)
  Verify: bash $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/tests/scripts/test-utility-scripts-v2-removal.sh

## Files Modified
- plugins/dso/scripts/issue-quality-check.sh
- plugins/dso/scripts/check-acceptance-criteria.sh
- plugins/dso/scripts/issue-summary.sh
- plugins/dso/scripts/issue-batch.sh
- plugins/dso/scripts/release-debug-lock.sh
- plugins/dso/scripts/qualify-ticket-refs.sh
comments.author: Joe Oakhart

comments.body: CHECKPOINT 2/6: Code patterns understood ✓ — 8 failing tests: issue-quality-check.sh (TK= + tk call), check-acceptance-criteria.sh (TK= + tk call), issue-summary.sh (TK= only), issue-batch.sh (TK= + tk call), release-debug-lock.sh (tk call only). qualify-ticket-refs.sh already passes.
comments.author: Joe Oakhart

comments.body: CHECKPOINT 3/6: Tests written (none required) ✓ — RED tests already exist in tests/scripts/test-utility-scripts-v2-removal.sh (from ticket 8385-dd5b)
comments.author: Joe Oakhart

comments.body: CHECKPOINT 4/6: Implementation complete ✓ — Removed TK= from issue-quality-check.sh, check-acceptance-criteria.sh, issue-summary.sh, issue-batch.sh; replaced $TK calls with TICKET_CMD/ticket CLI; fixed tk calls in release-debug-lock.sh; updated Python docstrings in issue-batch.sh
comments.author: Joe Oakhart

comments.body: CHECKPOINT 5/6: Validation passed ✓ — test-batched.sh completed 122/122 tests. Our target test (test-utility-scripts-v2-removal.sh) passes 12/12. The 2 failures (test-lifecycle-portability.sh, test-merge-to-main.sh) are pre-existing, unrelated to this task.
comments.author: Joe Oakhart

comments.body: CHECKPOINT 6/6: Done ✓ — AC1: no TK= assignments in any of 6 scripts (verified). AC2: test-utility-scripts-v2-removal.sh passes 12/12 tests (GREEN).
comments.author: Joe Oakhart

comments.body: Fixed: migrated issue-batch.sh, issue-quality-check.sh, issue-summary.sh, check-acceptance-criteria.sh, release-debug-lock.sh from v2 tk to v3 ticket CLI
comments.author: Joe Oakhart
